title: Trust Deed Review GPT Knowledge Manifest

recommended_gpt.name: Australian Trust Deed Checklist Assistant
recommended_gpt.description: Reviews Australian trust deeds and company reports, extracts clause-backed trust facts, and prepares a Markdown checklist for practitioner review.

matter_document_handling: Matter documents should be uploaded only inside the relevant GPT chat.
scope: Extraction, checklist review and issue spotting only. Use the action-backed service once exact DOCX checklist/minute generation is required.
